subject: fix(pwa): align install/update hooks with upstream reference patterns
body:
Audited existing PWA hooks against glow-props shared standards and
fixed gaps identified in the comparison.

usePWAInstall.ts:
- Added install analytics tracking (prompted/installed/dismissed events
  stored in localStorage, last 50 entries) for diagnostics
- Added 5-second Chromium diagnostic: logs warning via debugLog if
  beforeinstallprompt hasn't fired, with hasManifest/swControlled state
- Simplified browser detection: removed confusing double-negative logic,
  reordered to check Safari/Firefox before Chromium fallback
- Fixed triggerInstall to always clear deferred prompt (not just on accept)

usePWAUpdate.ts:
- Added offline-ready auto-dismiss after 3 seconds (non-critical info
  notification shouldn't persist indefinitely)

Tags: pwa, refactor, shared-standards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: shared-standards
Semver: patch
